title: impatiens khasiana
intro: Impatiens khasiana, also known as the Balsam Flower or Khasiana Balsam, is a species of flowering plant in the family Balsamaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Impatiens khasiana include reducing fever, alleviating cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
